title: BLUE VerifierPlus
description: BLUE VerifierPlus allows users to verify any <supportedLink>supported</supportedLink> digital academic credential. This application was developed by the <dccLink>Digital Credentials Consortium</dccLink>, a network of leading international universities designing an open infrastructure for digital academic credentials, and has been evolved for <blueLink>BLUE</blueLink>, the academic trust network operated by <redirisLink>RedIRIS</redirisLink> (Red.es) in collaboration with <crueLink>CRUE Universidades Españolas</crueLink>. <whyTrust>Why trust us?</whyTrust>
textareaLabel: Paste JSON, JWT, SD-JWT, or URL
requestFromWallet: Request from web wallet via CHAPI
scanQrWithPhone: Scan QR code with phone camera to open:
dragAndDrop: Drag and drop a file here or <browseLink>browse</browseLink>
multipleCredentials: Presentation had multiple credentials but only the first is displayed

errors.invalidInput: The input is not a valid Verifiable Credential (JSON, JWT, or SD-JWT)
